questions.text: Does pineapple belong on pizza?
Is cereal a soup?
Is ketchup the only condiment anyone actually needs?

vocab.stanceFor: flavor is about contrast, not tradition
vocab.evidence: sweet-and-savory pairings appear in every cuisine on Earth

questions.text: Tabs or spaces?
Should phones be banned at the dinner table?
Does anyone actually need a smart fridge?

vocab.stanceFor: tools should adapt to people, not the reverse
vocab.stanceAgainst: convenience keeps costing more than it gives
vocab.evidence: every settings menu ever abandoned half-configured
vocab.expert: anyone who has watched a relative fight a router

questions.text: Is a tie an acceptable way for a game to end?
Are esports real sports?
Is competitive eating an athletic discipline?

vocab.stanceFor: competition is defined by skill under pressure
vocab.stanceAgainst: not everything with a scoreboard is a sport
vocab.evidence: decades of record books and ruined Sundays
vocab.expert: any referee with a whistle and regrets

questions.text: Is there a statute of limitations on spoilers?
Should Hollywood stop making reboots?
Is an action movie set at Christmas a Christmas movie?

vocab.stanceAgainst: the original context is the whole point
vocab.evidence: a century of remakes, sequels, and betrayed fandoms
vocab.expert: every critic with a year-end list

questions.text: Should Pluto still be a planet?
Is the five-second rule real?
If time travel existed, should anyone be allowed to use it?

vocab.stanceAgainst: sentiment is not a unit of measurement
vocab.evidence: the data, which does not care about anyone's feelings
vocab.expert: the peer reviewers, all three of them

questions.text: If you replace every part of a ship, is it the same ship?
Is a hot dog a sandwich?
If a tree falls with no one around, does it make a sound?

vocab.stanceAgainst: words mean things or nothing does
vocab.evidence: two thousand years of people arguing in togas
vocab.expert: a philosopher who has never once been on time

questions.text: Toilet paper: over or under?
Is making your bed every morning actually worth it?
Should shoes ever be worn inside the house?

vocab.stanceFor: small habits are where character lives
vocab.stanceAgainst: some rituals are just chores with marketing
vocab.evidence: every household that has ever kept the peace

questions.text: Cats or dogs?
Do fish count as real pets?
Do pigeons deserve more respect?

vocab.stanceFor: loyalty should be earned, not demanded
vocab.evidence: ten thousand years of domestication receipts
vocab.expert: any veterinarian at the end of a long shift
